item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response clearly brakes the requested N+1 manual gate in its first sentence, identifies the prior pattern of repeated downstream human checkpoints for missing stamp, budget code, approver, and contract number, moves upstream to recurring entry data/rule/owner/system-constraint failure, and proposes classification plus system validation/master data/template constraints with manual handling only for exceptions.
